> Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## 🔗 Related Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

---

## 📊 Type of Change

Please check the type that applies:

- [ ] ✨ `feat` — New feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] 📖 `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 `style` — Code formatting (no logic change)
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code restructuring
- [ ] 🧪 `test` — Tests added or updated
- [ ] 🔧 `chore` — Build, CI, or dependency update
- [ ] 🚨 `hotfix` — Urgent production fix

---

## 🌿 Branch Checklist

- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `hotfix/*`, etc.)
- [ ] I branched from the correct base branch (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commits follow the Conventional Commits format

---

## ✅ Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have reviewed my own code before requesting review
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] I have added or updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have resolved all merge conflicts
- [ ] I have linked the related issue(s) above
